reviews.comment:
Es una verdadera estacion de servicio, cuenta con lavadero automatico, lavadero artesanal, y diferentes pisos para reparaciones de vehiculos, un lugar donde tomar algo y por cierto... surtidores para combustible.

Si sos socio del ACA, posees descuentos en todo lo que te ofrece esta estacion de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a proper service station, complete with an automatic car wash, a hand wash, and multiple levels for vehicle repairs, a place to grab a bite, and of course... fuel pumps.

If you're an ACA member, you get discounts on everything this service station offers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNC1wThAB
